first_evidence_text: representatives of Thoma Bravo informally approached and had brief meetings with representatives of the Company, and expressed Thoma Bravo's potential interest in exploring a possible business transaction with the Company.

actor_notes: One financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing confidentiality agreement; not individually identified
first_evidence_text: Except for one financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing its confidentiality agreement, each party that entered into a confidentiality agreement attended a high-level management presentation.
The advisory committee authorized Company management to inquire whether Barclays would be available to act as a financial advisor to the Company in connection with a potential strategic transaction.
Members of Company management, Chip Linnemann, a consultant to the Company, and representatives of the Company's outside legal counsel, Goodwin Procter LLP ("Goodwin"), were in attendance.
On July 7, 2016, Thoma Bravo's outside counsel, Kirkland & Ellis LLP ("Kirkland") sent a revised draft of the merger agreement to Goodwin.
